description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a fenced yard, featuring a combination of flat and gable roofs in dark gray. The front facade includes a double garage, a paved driveway, and a landscaped garden with shrubs and a blossoming tree. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the building, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard is spacious and mostly covered with grass, bordered by privacy fencing and a wooden accent section. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the dark roof and fence. The property is well-defined with clear pathways, a front gate, and a mix of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gable and flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and landscaped front and back yards enclosed by fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, driveway, front garden, and a blossoming tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage doors, side yard, and the transition between the front and back lawns.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, extensive windows, and a wooden accent on the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, roof structure, and the rear garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on rear and front facades
